title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-27
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the plants and updating the health metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app showcase reflects the latest usage statistics and uptime health.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot with a watering can tending to pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse, with the bee mascot holding a tiny clipboard checking off metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head using a watering can on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
